basics.description: **Note:** Please refer to the following before installing the solution: • Review the solution [Release Notes](https://github.com/Azure/Azure-Sentinel/tree/master/Solutions/Tailscale%20%28CCF%29/ReleaseNotes.md) • There may be [known issues](https://aka.ms/sentinelsolutionsknownissues) pertaining to this Solution, please refer to them before installing. The [Tailscale](https://tailscale.com/) solution for Microsoft Sentinel ingests Tailscale telemetry via OAuth2-secured APIs. **Data connectors in this solution (install one based on your Tailscale plan):** - **Tailscale Standard (CCF)** — Configuration audit logs (`/logging/configuration`). Use on **Personal (Free) and Standard** tailnets. Included in this release. - **Tailscale Premium (CCF)** — Configuration audit + network flow logs (`/logging/configuration` + `/logging/network`). Use on **Premium and Enterprise** tailnets. *Planned for a future release.* **Underlying technology:** Microsoft Sentinel Codeless Connector Framework (CCF) with OAuth2 client-credentials auth. **Pre-requisites:** 1. Sign in to [Tailscale OAuth settings](https://login.tailscale.com/admin/settings/oauth) 2. Create an OAuth client with the **Audit Logs - Read** scope (Standard connector). For the Premium connector also tick **Network Logs - Read**. 3. Copy the client ID and client secret (secret shown once) 4. Note your tailnet name from the [Keys page](https://login.tailscale.com/admin/settings/keys) **Data Connectors:** 2, **Analytic Rules:** 5 [Learn more about Microsoft Sentinel](https://aka.ms/azuresentinel) | [Learn more about Solutions](https://aka.ms/azuresentinelsolutionsdoc)

basics.toolTip: This filters by workspaces that exist in the Resource Group selected

basics.name: workspace
basics.label: Workspace
basics.toolTip: This dropdown will list only workspace that exists in the Resource Group selected

options.text: This Solution installs the data connector for Tailscale Standard (CCF). You can get Tailscale Standard (CCF) data in your Microsoft Sentinel workspace. After installing the solution, configure and enable this data connector by following guidance in Manage solution view.

link.label: Learn more about connecting data sources

options.text: This Solution installs the data connector for Tailscale Premium (CCF). You can get Tailscale Premium (CCF) data in your Microsoft Sentinel workspace. After installing the solution, configure and enable this data connector by following guidance in Manage solution view.

link.label: Learn more about connecting data sources

options.text: This solution installs the following analytic rule templates. After installing the solution, create and enable analytic rules in Manage solution view.

elements.name: analytic1
elements.label: Tailscale: New API access token or OAuth client created

options.text: A new API access token or OAuth client was created in the tailnet. These grant programmatic access — verify the actor and intent.
The tailnet ACL/policy file was modified. Review the diff — incorrect ACLs can silently expand blast radius across the tailnet.
A new auth key was generated. Auth keys allow unattended device enrollment into the tailnet — confirm it was expected and revoke if not.

elements.name: analytic4
elements.label: Tailscale: Exit node advertised or approved

options.text: A device started advertising itself as an exit node, or an admin approved one. Validate the device and operator — rogue exit nodes can intercept tailnet egress.

elements.name: analytic5
elements.label: Tailscale: Mass credential revocation in short window

options.text: Five or more API keys, OAuth clients, or auth keys were revoked/deleted within an hour. May be routine rotation, but also a typical cleanup pattern after credential compromise.
